title: How is the guard stabbed in EoE
display_title: How is the guard stabbed in EoE
wikitext:
[]: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by Javik » Sun Jul 31, 2016 8:48 pm There's a scene in EoE in which SEELE initiates the attack on Nerv headquarters. In one scene a soldier sneaks behind one of the Nerv guards, stabs him and then they open the gates. The thing is, how did he sneak unnoticed if the gates were close. Wouldn't the guard hear the gate behind him opening up? Or did he somehow enter from the side? Then how did he not notice him if he's standing so close to the wall? Here are two pictures I've made depicting the scene: The Guard being stabbed The view behind him:

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by CommanderFish » Sun Jul 31, 2016 9:17 pm I've always thought that the guy was a double-agent. a.k.a. he worked for both the NERV guard personnel as well as the JSDF. That is obviously just a fanwank though. I think the point of the stabbing was ultimately to get a cool-looking shot, which in my opinion, it was.

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 31, 2016 10:01 pm Looks like there's just enough space behind the guard for the soldier to ninja/MGS that shit and sneak behind him.

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by Javik » Mon Aug 01, 2016 3:14 am Well, but how did he get behind him in the first place. I mean, wouldn't he have to hop through all the terminals on the way?

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Aug 01, 2016 6:09 am ^ The guard's face suggests that he's wondering the same thing. Guard: "The fuck...?" Man in Black: *STAB* "Shhh... Just let it happen.

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by Glor » Mon Aug 01, 2016 10:35 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Guard: "The fuck...?" Man in Black: *STAB* "Shhh... Just let it happen.

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Aug 03, 2016 12:28 pm Honestly, I think it was done simply because it was a quick and simple shot. I often find myself wondering similar things as I'm writing my own scripts and projects. "Wait, how would this character have gotten from here to there in the first place anyway?" You try to write in an explanation, but quickly realize that it's distracting from the main story and you've already got 12 other things than need to be established before we can get into the juicy part of the story. So instead of explaining something, you just state that something simply happened that way in the script and hope the confidence of the scene makes it so no one questions how it happened. EoE had a ton of story progression to go through after the invasion, and I'd rather the film use two simple shots to establish that minimal plot point rather than dedicate a whole scene explaining how they invaded. Air is all about getting Shinji into Unit 01 and getting Rei to Lilith. Everything else, how ever important it might have been to the narrative, was still either tangental or in support of those two narrative goals. By the end of Love is Destructive , very few people are thinking "Wait, how did that dude get behind the guard?"

[]: Re: How is the guard stabbed in EoE             Quote Post by mammaluser » Thu Aug 25, 2016 10:05 am He could have dropped from the ceiling or as other people in this thread suggested he could have been a double agent.
